content.text:

First, I'll set up the environment and run the triggering test to confirm the failure.

content.text: Now I'll run the triggering test to confirm the failure:

input.description: Run the triggering test to confirm it fails

content.content:
Failing tests: 1
  - org.jfree.chart.renderer.category.junit.StatisticalBarRendererTests::testDrawWithNullMeanVertical
Running ant (compile.tests)................................................ OK
Running ant (run.dev.tests)................................................ OK

content.text: Great! I've confirmed that the test is indeed failing. Now let me examine the buggy file and the test to understand the issue:
Now let me look at the test that's failing to understand the issue:

Now I can see the issue! Looking at the test `testDrawWithNullMeanVertical`, I can see that it adds a null mean value to the dataset:

```java
dataset.add(null, new Double(4.0), "S1", "C2");
```

The problem is in the `StatisticalBarRenderer.java` file. In both `drawHorizontalItem` and `drawVerticalItem` methods, the code is calling `.doubleValue()` on a `Number` object without checking if it's null first.

Let me examine the relevant sections more closely:

In `drawVerticalItem` method:
```java
Number meanValue = dataset.getMeanValue(row, column);
double value = meanValue.doubleValue();  // This line will fail if meanValue is null
```

And later:
```java
double valueDelta = dataset.getStdDevValue(row, column).doubleValue();  // This line will fail if stdDev is null
```

The same issues occur in `drawHorizontalItem` method.

I need to fix both cases by adding null checks before calling `.doubleValue()` methods.

Let me create the fix:

todos.content: Identify the exact location of the bug causing NullPointerException when meanValue is null
Fix the null pointer issue in drawVerticalItem method where meanValue is accessed
Fix the null pointer issue in drawHorizontalItem method where meanValue is accessed
Also fix potential null issue with std deviation values
Test the fix by running the triggering test again
Create the final diff patch
